intro:

Dolichos biflorus is a leguminous vine native to tropical Asia, its definition is a plant in the family Fabaceae.

Dolichos biflorus has been reported to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antidiabetic properties. It may help to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health.
